basics.name: Guillermo Beltrán
basics.label: Senior Front-End Engineer / Tech Lead
basics.summary: Front-End Engineer with 11+ years building high-traffic web applications (1M+ daily users) for SaaS, travel, and classifieds platforms. Specialized in React, legacy system migrations, performance optimization, and product observability. Proven track record leading migrations that cut build times by 30+ minutes and enabled 1,000+ additional daily bookings. Cross-functional experience with product, design, backend, and analytics teams.

work.name: Distillery (Rocketmiles by RocketTravel)
work.summary: Led the full migration from AngularJS 1.8 to React for millions of daily users across major airline partners, improving Developer Experience, maintainability, and user experience. Owned the front-end team's observability and experimentation strategy.
highlights: Led AngularJS 1.8 to React migration for millions of daily users, improving performance and maintainability
Migrated from Webpack to Vite, cutting build times by 30+ minutes and streamlining the CI/CD pipeline
Designed and implemented a cross-sell widget integrated across multiple partner websites, driving 1,000+ additional daily bookings with measurable revenue growth
Built dashboards with Snowplow + Grafana and cut reporting latency from 4 hours to real-time; implemented Datadog RUM with structured logging and alerting for early issue detection
Owned cookie consent compliance using OneTrust (CCPA/GDPR): consent banners, semi-annual audits per partner, and cookie category management
Ran 20+ A/B experiments (90% success rate) and mentored 2-3 front-end engineers per squad
Environment: React, TypeScript, Vite, AngularJS, Snowplow, Grafana, Datadog RUM, OneTrust, Jest, Playwright, GitLab CI/CD, Docker, Feature Flags

work.name: Parallel Staff (Intrado Project)
work.summary: Led front-end development for a video-first meeting platform, delivering custom branding, multi-monitor previews, screen sharing, and participant management.
highlights: Optimized web client performance, enabling meetings to support up to 300% more simultaneous participants
Extended cross-browser compatibility including mobile browsers, and reduced CPU/memory usage for a smoother experience
Environment: React, WebRTC, Node.js, Redux, REST APIs, Jenkins

work.name: Wizeline
work.summary: Built fintech products and enterprise training programs, combining product development with technical knowledge transfer.
highlights: Developed Thynkbooks: AI-assisted bank transaction categorization tool that automated tax-ready financial report generation
Designed and delivered a training program for Coppel's e-commerce teams on modern web development practices
Contributed to site performance improvements and client revenue growth
Environment: React, Vue, Node.js, Python, REST APIs, Storybook, Chakra UI, Git

work.name: Segundamano (Adevinta Group)
work.summary: Modernized high-traffic classified pages and revamped the payment funnel for Mexico's largest classifieds platform.
highlights: Modernized classified pages for 1M daily users with lazy-loading, pagination, and SEO-optimized SSR, improving performance and conversions
Revamped payment funnel integrating PayPal and Conekta, and implemented a virtual coin refund system that increased user retention
Built internal back-office solutions that streamlined workflows for customer support, marketing, and sales teams
Onboarded and mentored new developers, standardizing development and testing practices across teams
Environment: React, Vue, JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3, Node.js, Webpack, Jenkins, Git, PostgreSQL

education.institution: Instituto Tecnológico y de Estudios Superiores de Monterrey (ITESM)

languages.fluency: Professional Working Proficiency (B1, Distillery Internal Evaluation)

Full-stack project portfolio
Self-hosted on own VPS with CI/CD

Bilingual (ES/EN) with localStorage persistence
Print-optimized and JSON Resume schema-based

projects.name: Cronio
projects.description: Smart workout timer app. AI-powered routine configuration (EMOM, AMRAP, intervals). Shareable routines via unique links.
highlights: Next.js + TypeScript + Supabase
AI-powered routine configuration
Shareable routine links

projects.name: AAOS
projects.description: AI Agent Operating System orchestrating 10+ specialized agents (nutrition, training, analytics, DevOps) through a centralized Supabase blackboard, n8n automations, and Claude as runtime.
highlights: 10+ specialized agents with Claude Code
Centralized blackboard (Supabase + n8n)
Health, training, and ecommerce pipelines
